features: Material: The shredded paper towels are made of raffia paper, which is soft and light, easy to carry, and can be reused.
Glitter Membrane: The shredded tissue paper uses a glitter membrane, more shining and beautiful than ordinary shredded tissue paper, adding more charm to your gifts.

Shock Absorption: The shredded raffia paper can fill the space in the gift box and has a shock absorption function. After the gift is taken out, it can quickly rebound and return to its original shape.
Protection: You can use these shredded paper towels to fill the basket gift box, it can protect your gift or package from damage.
Widely Applicable: Can help decorate various parties, weddings, etc. For example New Year, Valentine's Day, Christmas, parties, and other holiday gift box packaging.
description: Product Description Specifications: Colour: Gold, Black, Red, Green, Iridescent, White, Khaki Weight: 100g &200g Function: 1. These filler paper are beautifully designed to add charm to your gifts. 2. You can use these filler paper for hamper basket filling, wine box filler, gift packaging, wrapping, or other fillers.
